brand_voice: Aggressive, masculine, high-performance, agency-floor energy, locker-room playbook. Tone is 'On the Field', 'Halftime', 'Playbook'.

scales.jersey_number: text-[8rem] leading-none font-display text-white/5 absolute -bottom-4 -right-4 pointer-events-none select-none

depth_and_elevation.grain: fixed inset-0 pointer-events-none opacity-[0.03] mix-blend-overlay bg-[url('/noise.png')] (or implement SVG noise filter)

layout_and_spacing.grid_client: Bento layout, asymmetric grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-8. Generous padding (p-8 to p-12).
layout_and_spacing.grid_admin: Control room layout, dense grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-6 gap-4. Tight padding (p-4 to p-6).
layout_and_spacing.general: Never center-everything. Asymmetry creates tension. Use grid spans like col-span-8 and col-span-4 for hierarchy.

motion_and_interactions.entrance: Staggered fade-up, translate-y-4 opacity-0 to translate-y-0 opacity-100
motion_and_interactions.celebration: Scale pulse on completion checkmarks, subtle gold/teal glow expanding outwards on finish

stat_cards.client: Asymmetric bento cards (bg-[#1b2035] or bg-[#252b40]). Feature large glowing 'jersey-number' styled metrics in the background (using 'jersey_number' typography scale). Hard edges or minimal rounded (rounded-sm).
stat_cards.admin: Dense, crisp 1px borders (border-[#252b40]), monospace values for exact metrics, tight padding (p-4), subtle trend lines. Flat background.

data_tables.container: w-full border-collapse border border-[#252b40] rounded-none bg-[#1b2035]
data_tables.headers: sticky top-0 bg-[#252b40] text-xs font-mono uppercase tracking-widest text-[#94a3b8] p-4 text-left border-b border-[#2d354f]
data_tables.status_pill: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded-sm text-xs font-mono font-medium border border-current/20

video_player.wrapper: relative rounded-none border border-white/10 shadow-[0_0_40px_rgba(0,196,180,0.1)] overflow-hidden aspect-video bg-black
video_player.overlay: absolute inset-0 bg-gradient-to-t from-[#161b2e]/90 via-transparent to-transparent pointer-events-none

upload_drop_zones.container: border-2 border-dashed border-[#00c4b4]/40 hover:border-[#00c4b4] hover:bg-[#00c4b4]/5 transition-colors p-12 text-center rounded-none

sidebars.client: Generous padding, large active state indicators (thick left border in teal #00c4b4), prominent tier ladder progress ring widget.
sidebars.admin: Slimmer, utility-focused, mono font navigation links, dark surface #1b2035 with 1px right border border-white/5. Semantic red for 'Churn Signals'.

iconography.style: Use 1.5px stroke width. Sharp, authoritative look. No unnecessary roundness.

images.description: Cinematic dark navy locker room background with neon teal and gold lighting. High performance sports theme. Use as main background for magic-link login page with a heavy black/navy overlay (bg-[#161b2e]/80) to ensure form legibility.
Abstract tactical playbook diagram on a dark navy chalkboard, glowing teal lines and X and O patterns. Use for Module grid thumbnails or course headers.
Dark control room abstract background, subtle glowing gold and teal data nodes. Use as a subtle textured background header for the Admin portal top section.
Empty state illustration, sleek dark mode, minimalist sports helmet wireframe glowing in teal. Use for 'No Documents Found', 'No Lessons', or 'Sync Complete' states.

imagery_and_media.usage_guidelines: Never use placeholder text or gray boxes. Always use provided image URLs. The hero image is a paid asset — let it breathe. Ensure overlays are maximum bg-black/50 or bg-[#161b2e]/80 if text contrast is required.

testing.data_testid_convention: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute using kebab-case, role-based formatting (e.g., 'login-form-submit-button', 'admin-client-row', 'lesson-video-player', 'ghl-sync-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark navy (#161b2e) and teal (#00c4b4) palette. Do not invent external grays (like slate/gray from Tailwind); explicitly use the provided hex codes or Tailwind arbitrary values like bg-[#1b2035].
Implement 'Bebas Neue' (font-display) for all H1/H2 and large metric numbers to evoke the 'Locker Room / Playbook' feel. Never use generic sans for headings.
Implement 'DM Sans' (font-body) for readability in body text.
Implement 'JetBrains Mono' (font-mono) for all IDs, timestamps, and admin data table headers.
Ensure the Admin Portal feels distinctively denser and more 'tactical war-room' (Grid: Mode B) compared to the Client Portal's spacious, motivational layout (Grid: Mode A).
Integrate the generated images into their respective components (Hero/Login/Empty States). Do not use generic placeholders.
Ensure all custom UI elements (like progress rings and jersey-number watermarks) are styled per these guidelines, utilizing absolute positioning and negative z-index where necessary.
Make heavy use of depth: layers should step up via background color (#161b2e -> #1b2035 -> #252b40).
Use standard HTML/Tailwind components and Shadcn where logic is needed (Data Tables, Dialogs) but heavily customize them to remove the default Vercel-look.
